title: Origins: Empyrean
description: An origin all about flight and knocking people out of the sky!
body:
# Empyrean
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/478137114d717bf5dc52985ac2c856e7162bae19.png)

**An Impact 2 origin**

_Weightless floating creatures, adept at flight and forming pressurized air using their specialized bodies._

## List of Powers
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/478137114d717bf5dc52985ac2c856e7162bae19.png)
<details>
<summary>Lightweight</summary>

![Lightweight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/U3ITmSRv/images/f118d2f623e633e967b027265a613b8e0a41d082.gif)

You can control the air surrounding you, allowing you to float, fly and fall gracefully.
Flying is exhausting and only possible when able to sprint.

<details>
<summary>Info</summary>
Trigger flight abilities by pressing space when in mid-air. Holding space will allow you to fly.
  
  Deactivate flight abilities by double-tapping shift or landing. 
  
  Shift can be held while flying to increase flight speed and -exhaustion rate. 
  
  Floating or flying is not possible when inside any fluid.
</details>
</details>


<details>
<summary>Dual Strike</summary>
Lob a ball of compressed air, knocking targets back but dealing no damage.
  
Air balls behave differently depending on if they were thrown while on the ground, floating, or flying.
  
__Radius Charge__

A low-velocity, heavy air ball which explodes upon contact with any physical object, knocking nearby entities away.
Activate with your primary ability key when flying **or** in mid-air but not floating.

![Radius Charge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/U3ITmSRv/images/5f0fa9b7e8bc14c6361070a0591b64e81dbea7a0.gif)

__Precision Charge__

A high-velocity, weightless air ball which deals heavy knockback upon contact with an entity.
Activate with your primary ability key when standing on a block **or** floating.

![Precision Charge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/U3ITmSRv/images/1981b5a863555d3d28e8598d9bfd6297ae1ce971.gif)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Buoyant</summary>
You can't sink in water and rise to its surface, even allowing you to walk on it.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Ballast</summary>
Wearing armor weighs you down, making it more difficult and exhausting to float.

Elytras do not fit your body. You can't use firework rockets to propel yourself when flying.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Burst</summary>
Taking 5 or more damage when flying will burst you, piercing your armor and preventing you from flying until you've regenerated most of your health.
</details>

## Dependencies
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/478137114d717bf5dc52985ac2c856e7162bae19.png)
This datapack requires the [Origins Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)!
